# Privacy Policy

**Last Updated:** October 6, 2025

## 1. Introduction

This Privacy Policy explains how Conversely ("we," "us," "our") collects, uses, shares, and protects your personal information when you use our platform at conversely.online (the "Service").

**Data Controller:** Conversely  
**Contact:** hello@conversely.online

## 2. Information We Collect

### 2.1 Automatically Generated Data

When you use Conversely, we automatically generate:
- **Session ID:** A unique identifier (UUID) for your temporary session
- **Username:** A randomly generated username (e.g., "AnonymousUser123")
- **Avatar:** A randomly assigned avatar identifier
- **Session Expiry:** Timestamp when your session will expire (24 hours from creation)

### 2.2 Survey Responses

To match you with conversation partners, we collect:
- Your answers to 3-5 randomized survey questions about preferences and viewpoints
- Question IDs and selected responses
- Survey submission timestamp

### 2.3 Conversation Data

During active conversations, we temporarily store:
- **Messages:** Content of messages you send
- **Timestamps:** When messages were sent
- **Room ID:** Identifier for your conversation room
- **Sender ID:** Session ID of the message sender

### 2.4 Technical & Log Data

For security, moderation, and debugging, we collect:
- **IP Address:** Your public IP address
- **User Agent:** Browser and device information
- **Request Logs:** API calls and function invocations
- **Moderation Flags:** Content flagged by our automated systems
- **Error Logs:** Technical errors for troubleshooting

### 2.5 Data We Do NOT Collect

- Email addresses (unless you contact us at hello@conversely.online)
- Phone numbers
- Names, physical addresses, or identity documents
- Payment information (our service is free)
- Browsing history or cookies for tracking
- Cross-session identifiers or persistent tracking

## 3. How We Use Your Information

### 3.1 Service Delivery

- Creating temporary sessions for platform access
- Matching you with conversation partners based on survey responses
- Delivering messages in real-time
- Enforcing our 2-minute message expiry policy

### 3.2 Safety & Moderation

- Automated content moderation to enforce our Acceptable Use Policy
- Blocking prohibited content (profanity, personal info, URLs, abuse)
- Rate limiting to prevent spam and abuse
- Investigating Terms of Service violations

### 3.3 Security & Compliance

- Preventing bot attacks and unauthorized access (via hCaptcha)
- Detecting suspicious activity and fraud
- Complying with legal obligations (e.g., responding to valid court orders)
- Logging security events for audit purposes

### 3.4 Platform Improvement

- Analyzing anonymized usage patterns (e.g., average conversation length)
- Debugging technical errors
- Improving matching algorithms
- Testing new features

We do NOT use your data for:
- Advertising or marketing
- Selling or renting data to third parties
- Profiling or behavioral tracking
- AI training (beyond automated moderation)

## 4. Data Retention & Deletion

| Data Type | Retention Period | Reason |
|-----------|------------------|--------|
| **Messages** | 2 minutes | Privacy by design; messages auto-expire |
| **Session Data** | 24 hours | Session expiry; then deleted |
| **Survey Answers** | 24 hours | Tied to session; deleted with session |
| **Conversation Rooms** | 2 minutes after end | Room closes when chat ends or expires |
| **Security Logs** | 60 days | Fraud prevention, abuse investigation |
| **Error Logs** | 30 days | Debugging and platform stability |
| **Moderation Flags** | 60 days | Appeals process and policy enforcement |

### Automatic Deletion

- **Messages:** Deleted automatically 2 minutes after being sent
- **Sessions:** Deleted automatically 24 hours after creation
- **Rooms:** Closed and deleted 2 minutes after the last message or when a user ends the chat

We do not offer message recovery—once deleted, data is permanently gone.

## 5. Data Sharing & Sub-Processors

### 5.1 Third-Party Services

Conversely uses the following sub-processors:

**Lovable Cloud / Supabase** (Database & Backend)
- Hosts our database and backend functions
- Stores session, survey, and message data
- Provides real-time messaging infrastructure
- Located in United States (us-east-1)
- Subject to Supabase's privacy policy

**hCaptcha** (Bot Prevention)
- Validates users are human before session creation
- Collects device and browser information for challenge delivery
- Subject to hCaptcha's privacy policy

### 5.2 Legal Disclosures

We may disclose your data if required by law:
- In response to valid court orders, subpoenas, or legal process
- To protect our rights, property, or safety
- To prevent fraud, abuse, or illegal activity
- In connection with a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets (with notice)

We will notify affected users of legal requests unless prohibited by law.

## 6. Data Security

### 6.1 Security Measures

We implement industry-standard security practices:
- **Encryption:** Data in transit via TLS/HTTPS
- **Access Controls:** Role-based access for internal systems
- **Rate Limiting:** Prevents brute-force attacks
- **Automated Moderation:** Blocks harmful content in real-time
- **Session Expiry:** Automatic timeout after 24 hours
- **hCaptcha Protection:** Prevents automated abuse

### 6.2 Data Breach Notification

In the event of a data breach affecting personal information:
- We will investigate and contain the breach promptly
- Affected users will be notified within 72 hours (where legally required)
- Notifications will include the nature of the breach and recommended actions
- We will report breaches to relevant authorities as required by law

### 6.3 Limitations

No system is completely secure. While we take reasonable precautions, we cannot guarantee absolute protection against unauthorized access, hacking, or data loss. You use the Service at your own risk.

## 7. Your Privacy Rights

Depending on your location, you may have the following rights:

### 7.1 Access & Data Portability (GDPR Art. 15, 20)

- Request a copy of your session data (while active)
- Export your survey responses and conversation metadata
- Note: Messages expire after 2 minutes and cannot be recovered

### 7.2 Deletion (GDPR Art. 17, CCPA)

- Request deletion of your session data
- Note: Sessions auto-delete after 24 hours anyway
- Deletion requests via email: hello@conversely.online

### 7.3 Correction (GDPR Art. 16)

- Survey responses and usernames are randomly generated and cannot be edited
- If you believe data is inaccurate, contact us at hello@conversely.online

### 7.4 Objection & Restriction (GDPR Art. 18, 21)

- Object to data processing for legitimate interests
- Restrict processing while disputes are resolved

### 7.5 Do Not Sell or Share (CPRA)

**We do not sell or share your personal information.**  
Conversely does not engage in data sales, advertising, or cross-context behavioral tracking.

### 7.6 Exercising Your Rights

To exercise these rights:
1. Email hello@conversely.online with "Privacy Request" in the subject
2. Include your session timestamp or approximate usage date
3. We will respond within 30 days (or as required by law)
4. We may request verification to prevent unauthorized access

## 8. Children's Privacy (Under 16)

Conversely is **not intended for users under 16 years of age.**

- We do not knowingly collect data from children under 16
- Age verification is required at first access
- If we discover a user is under 16, we will terminate their session immediately
- Parents/guardians can report underage use to hello@conversely.online

## 9. International Data Transfers

Our backend infrastructure (Supabase/Lovable Cloud) may process data outside your country of residence. By using Conversely:
- You consent to data transfers necessary for service operation
- We rely on Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) or other lawful transfer mechanisms
- Data is protected by the security measures described in Section 6

## 10. Your California Privacy Rights (CCPA/CPRA)

If you are a California resident:

**Right to Know:**  
You can request details about the categories and specific pieces of personal information we collect.

**Right to Delete:**  
You can request deletion of your personal information (subject to legal exceptions).

**Right to Opt-Out of Sale/Sharing:**  
We do not sell or share your personal information, so no opt-out is necessary.

**Right to Non-Discrimination:**  
We will not discriminate against you for exercising your privacy rights.

**Authorized Agent:**  
You may designate an authorized agent to submit requests on your behalf by emailing hello@conversely.online with proof of authorization.

## 11. European Privacy Rights (GDPR)

If you are in the EU/EEA/UK:

**Legal Basis for Processing:**
- **Legitimate Interests:** Service delivery, security, fraud prevention
- **Consent:** Age verification and optional contact (if you email us)
- **Legal Obligations:** Compliance with court orders, data breach notifications

**Supervisory Authority:**  
You have the right to lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority if you believe we have violated your privacy rights.

## 12. Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be effective when posted, with the "Last Updated" date revised.

**Material changes** (e.g., changes to data retention, sharing practices, or your rights) will require re-acceptance before continued use of the Service.

## 13. Contact Us

For privacy questions, data requests, or concerns:
- **Email:** hello@conversely.online
- **Platform:** conversely.online
- **Response Time:** Within 30 days for privacy rights requests

---

**By using Conversely, you acknowledge that you have read and understood this Privacy Policy.**
